name: GMB Crush
highlight_text: Category: Google Business Profile (GBP) Optimization & Rank Tracking
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What GMB Crush Does

GMB Crush is a Google Maps rank checker designed for SEOs, agencies, and businesses focused on local rankings. It audits Google Business Profiles, runs geo-grid scans, and provides SEO proposals. While packed with features, it’s best for marketers who want deep local insights rather than broad SEO tools.

Source: Chrome Webstore 

Key Features

  • GMB Crush reveals what’s helping your competitors rank – categories, reviews, content, citations, and posting habits.
  • The Geo Grid Pro tool maps your local visibility in detailed 250KM grids, showing exactly where you dominate (and where you don’t).
  • Built-in SEO proposal generators, SOPs, and training modules help you turn audits into actual revenue.

Benefits of GMB Crush

  • Helps businesses improve maps rank checker visibility
  • Automates GBP audits and competitor tracking
  • Provides step-by-step ranking strategies

Pricing

  • GMB Sidekick: $39.99/month (freelancers & small agencies)
  • GMB Local Hero: $89.99/month (growing agencies)
  • GMB SuperHero: $139.99/month (large agencies & enterprises)

Pros

  • Strong geo-grid tracking for local SEO
  • AI-powered SEO and lead generation tools
  • In-depth training resources

Cons

  • Focused only on Google Business Profiles
  • Higher plans needed for advanced features

‍

Summing Up…

Choosing the right Google Maps rank checker comes down to accuracy, ease of use, and the right features for your needs. Whether you're tracking multiple locations, monitoring competitors, or optimizing your maps rank checker results, the best tool should offer reliable data, automation, and reporting. The right tool saves time, helps you rank higher, and keeps your business visible to local customers.

‍

Get Started with Synup

Synup makes local SEO effortless. Track rankings, manage your online reputation, and optimize your Google Maps rank checker results—all in one place. With automated reports, multi-location tracking, and powerful insights, Synup helps businesses grow faster.

‍

Google Maps Rank Checker: FAQs

How do I check my Google Maps rankings?

You can check Google Maps rank using a rank tracking tool. All you need to do is enter your business name and location, and you’ll see where you rank for different keywords.

How can I check my Google ranking?

Go to Google Search Console. Under Performance, select the 'Search Results' tab. To view all of the search phrases you rank for, click 'Queries'. Enable 'Average Position' to track ranking changes.

How much does it cost to rank #1 on Google? 

Ranking #1 isn't cheap. When you factor in SEO, content, and link-building, it can cost around $10,000 per page. Competitive industries may cost even more.

‍
